branch.branch_summary: After v9.3.0, resume the provider track as v9.4 Provider-backed Controlled Execution Candidate, then v9.5 incident recovery evidence, v9.6 cost/quota boundary, and v9.7 third-party operator validation.

tree_answer.where_are_we: The runtime is between v9.3 and the next concrete branch.
tree_answer.why_this_branch: Ship v9.3 Capability-First Release Comprehension: release-ready claims must start from user-facing capability, capability delta, value evidence, and product review trigger before mechanism details.
tree_answer.what_branch_comes_next: Open an implementation task for the current frontier: After v9.3.0, resume the provider track as v9.4 Provider-backed Controlled Execution Candidate, then v9.5 incident recovery evidence, v9.6 cost/quota boundary, and v9.7 third-party operator validation.
